title: A Humpback Whale Breached Right Next to a Kayaker
script: A humpback whale the size of a bus breached right next to a kayaker, and the video is terrifying. The paddler was floating quietly when forty tons of whale exploded out of the water just feet away, crashing back down in a wall of white spray that nearly flipped the kayak. Humpbacks breach by launching almost their entire body into the air, and nobody fully knows why; it might be to communicate, knock off parasites, or just play. The kayaker was fine, just soaked and shaking. Getting that close to something that big is a once-in-a-lifetime near miss. So what makes a fifty-foot animal want to jump?

launching almost their entire body into the air
